Title: Why Deep Work Matters

Deep work, a concept coined by Cal Newport, refers to the ability to focus without distraction on cognitively demanding tasks. Newport argues that deep work is becoming increasingly rare but increasingly valuable in the knowledge economy. Key practices: time-blocking your calendar, eliminating social media during work hours, and building a shutdown ritual. His book 'Deep Work' is the definitive guide. I want to get better at this in 2026.
